tool_args.label: TBTA strengthens tinted window enforcement
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA has strengthened its focus on tinted window enforcement. TBTA's officers have been equipped with new tint meters that measure compliance with the Vehicle and Traffic Law.

payload.claim_text: TBTA has strengthened its focus on tinted window enforcement
payload.description: TBTA officers equipped with new tint meters that measure compliance with Vehicle and Traffic Law

tool_args.label: TBTA and TransCore receive three IBTTA awards
tool_args.raw_text: TBTA and TransCore received three awards by the International Bridge, Tunnel and Turnpike Association ("IBTTA") for the successful Central Business District Tolling Program and the Congestion Relief Zone. TransCore received the Toll Excellence Award for Private Sector Innovation, and TBTA was awarded a Toll Excellence Award for Social Responsibility, as well as IBTTA's highest achievement, the President's Award for Excellence.

payload.claim_text: TBTA and TransCore received three awards by IBTTA for the successful Central Business District Tolling Program and the Congestion Relief Zone
payload.description: TransCore received Toll Excellence Award for Private Sector Innovation; TBTA received Toll Excellence Award for Social Responsibility and IBTTA's President's Award for Excellence
